name: Muffin-Topped Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir meat and onions in a large skillet or Dutch oven until meat is brown.
2. Drain off fat.
3. Stir in kidney beans (with liquid), tomatoes (with liquid), and remaining ingredients; break up tomatoes.
4. Heat to boiling. Reduce heat; simmer uncovered until of desired consistency, about 15 minutes.
5. Preheat oven to 425°F.
6. Mix baking mix, 2 tablespoons cornmeal, the egg, and milk; beat vigorously for 1/2 minute.
7. Pour hot Chili con Carne into an ungreased 3-quart casserole.
8. Drop batter by spoonfuls around edge of casserole; sprinkle batter with 1 tablespoon cornmeal.
9. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes.
